sagemaker.coderepository.gitconfig.Branc.Description: The default branch for the Git repository.

sagemaker.coderepository.gitconfig.Repos.Description: The URL where the Git repository is located.

sagemaker.coderepository.gitconfig.Secre.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Secrets Manager secret that contains the credentials used to access the git repository. The secret must have a staging label of `AWSCURRENT` and must be in the following format:   `{"username": UserName, "password": Password}`
